refnamediv.refpurpose: Extract peaks from a Hough accumulator.

refsynopsisdiv.title: Syntax
refsynopsisdiv.synopsis: peaks = imhoughpeaks(accumulator, count) peaks = imhoughpeaks(accumulator, count, threshold, suppression)

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Returns row and column indices of the strongest accumulator peaks, with optional threshold and suppression radius.

refsection.title: Examples
